hero.eyebrow: THERMAL VACUUM SYSTEMS FOR AEROSPACE. ENGINEERED IN GERMANY.
hero.title: Thermal Vacuum Systems for Aerospace Qualification
hero.description: Deepvac develops modular and custom thermal vacuum systems for aerospace qualification, thermal cycling, and space environment simulation, combining high vacuum, precise thermal control, and engineering-led automation.

items: Built for demanding aerospace and laboratory test environments
Designed for repeatable thermal vacuum workflows
Configured for geometry, interfaces, and test profiles
Supported through retrofit, service, and subsystem integration

capabilities.title: Engineering Capabilities Across the Full TVAC Lifecycle
capabilities.description: Deepvac combines chamber platforms, control engineering, mechanical design, subsystem integration, and lifecycle support in one engineering-driven offering.

items.title: TVAC Chamber Platforms
items.description: Standardized and custom thermal vacuum chamber platforms for aerospace qualification, thermal cycling, and space environment simulation.

items.title: Control & Automation Systems
items.description: PLC-based control architectures, automation, data acquisition, and supervisory logic for stable, reproducible test execution.

items.title: Mechanical Design & Interfaces
items.description: Chamber layouts, fixtures, feedthroughs, mounting concepts, and support structures for customer-specific test configurations.

items.title: Thermal Control Systems
items.description: Thermal plate, shroud, and temperature control solutions for stable profiles, cycling, bake-out, and qualification workflows.

items.title: Vacuum Systems Engineering
items.description: Vacuum architectures with pumps, valves, sensors, and protection logic for reliable high-vacuum operation.

items.title: Test Campaign Support
items.description: Engineering and operational support for thermal vacuum test campaigns, from setup and preparation to execution.

items.title: Subsystem Integration
items.description: Integration of thermal, vacuum, instrumentation, and control subsystems into coherent test environments.

items.title: Retrofit, Maintenance & Repair
items.description: Modernization, maintenance, repair, and targeted upgrades for existing thermal vacuum infrastructure.

productPortfolio.title: Chamber Platforms
productPortfolio.description: Standardized and custom-engineered thermal vacuum systems for qualification and verification testing of aerospace hardware under controlled high-vacuum and thermal conditions.

tSeries.title: T Series TVAC
tSeries.subtitle: Cubic Thermal Vacuum Chambers
tSeries.description: Cubic thermal vacuum chambers for qualification, validation, and environmental simulation of aerospace hardware. The T Series provides a standardized chamber platform for controlled thermal vacuum testing across research, institutional, and commercial space applications.
tSeries.note: *Depending on the selected thermal concept, including direct LN₂ cooling, GN₂ circulation, or mechanical refrigeration.

cSeries.title: C Series TVAC
cSeries.subtitle: Cylindrical Thermal Vacuum Chambers
cSeries.description: Cylindrical thermal vacuum chambers for qualification, validation, and environmental simulation of aerospace hardware. The C Series provides a standardized chamber platform for controlled thermal vacuum testing across research, institutional, and commercial space applications.
cSeries.note: *Depending on the selected thermal concept, including direct LN₂ cooling, GN₂ circulation, or mechanical refrigeration.

custom.title: Custom TVAC
custom.subtitle: Application-Specific Thermal Vacuum Systems
custom.description: Custom thermal vacuum systems for applications beyond the standard series. These systems are developed for non-standard geometries, specific chamber volumes, extended temperature requirements, and additional subsystems tailored to dedicated test and qualification tasks.
custom.note: Custom systems can include dedicated interfaces, cryogenic shrouds, infrared heating, additional diagnostics, and other application-specific system extensions.

applications.title: Built for Aerospace Qualification and Thermal Vacuum Testing
applications.description: Deepvac systems support qualification, thermal cycling, development testing, and custom space environment simulation for spacecraft hardware, subsystems, and high-performance components.

items.title: Satellite Subsystem Qualification
items.description: Thermal vacuum testing of satellite components and subsystems under representative space conditions for qualification and performance verification.

items.title: Payload & Instrument Qualification
items.description: Environmental simulation and thermal vacuum verification of payload and instrument hardware before integration, launch, and mission use.

items.title: Thermal Cycling & Durability Testing
items.description: Controlled thermal cycling under high vacuum for durability testing of materials, assemblies, and critical hardware components.

items.title: Contamination-Controlled Testing
items.description: High-purity, low-outgassing test conditions for contamination-sensitive hardware and reproducible thermal vacuum test campaigns.

items.title: Development & Prototype Testing
items.description: Flexible chamber configurations for development programs, prototype validation, early-stage testing, and iterative hardware refinement.

items.title: Custom TVAC Configurations
items.description: Application-specific thermal vacuum systems tailored to unique geometries, interfaces, thermal profiles, and test requirements.

services.title: Support Across the Full TVAC Lifecycle
services.description: From new chamber development to modernization, maintenance, and subsystem integration, Deepvac supports thermal vacuum infrastructure across planning, implementation, and long-term operation.

pillars.title: New Chamber Development
pillars.description: Support for the planning and implementation of new thermal vacuum infrastructure, from early engineering through system realization.

pillars.title: Modernization & Upgrades
pillars.description: Targeted upgrades for legacy systems to improve control quality, reliability, operability, and long-term technical performance.

pillars.title: Operations & Lifecycle Support
pillars.description: Maintenance, repair, and campaign support to keep test infrastructure available, stable, and ready for demanding qualification workflows.

items.label: Campaign support
items.title: Testing Services
items.description: Support for qualification, validation, and development test campaigns requiring stable environmental control and repeatable workflows.

items.label: Control architecture
items.title: Control Systems Design
items.description: Design of chamber control architectures, automation logic, user interfaces, and instrumentation integration for reliable system operation.

items.label: Mechanical engineering
items.title: Mechanical Design
items.description: Engineering of chamber assemblies, interfaces, fixturing, support structures, and application-specific mechanical integration concepts.

items.label: Legacy system upgrades
items.title: Retrofit & Modernization
items.description: Technical upgrades for legacy TVAC systems to improve reliability, operability, safety, control precision, and lifecycle performance.

items.label: Availability support
items.title: Maintenance & Repair
items.description: Diagnostics, preventive maintenance, servicing, and repair to support long-term chamber availability and reduced downtime.

items.label: System integration
items.title: Subsystem Integration
items.description: Integration of thermal, vacuum, instrumentation, and control subsystems into coherent test environments tailored to specific customer requirements.

whyDeepvac.title: Built on Engineering Depth
whyDeepvac.description: Deepvac combines engineering discipline, integrated system design, and lifecycle support to deliver reliable thermal vacuum infrastructure.

items.title: Modular Platforms & Custom Systems
items.description: Deepvac offers standardized chamber platforms and custom thermal vacuum systems, from compact test setups to large-scale qualification infrastructure.

items.title: Engineering-Driven System Design
items.description: Projects start from technical requirements, system architecture, interface definition, and integration logic to create robust application-specific test environments.

items.title: Integrated Hardware, Controls & Support
items.description: Chamber hardware, control systems, subsystem integration, modernization, and service are combined in one coordinated engineering approach.

items.title: Built for Qualification-Grade Environments
items.description: System concepts are developed around the requirements of aerospace qualification, thermal cycling, contamination-sensitive testing, and advanced research use cases.

items.title: From New Systems to Modernization
items.description: Deepvac supports projects across concept development, manufacturing, commissioning, retrofit, maintenance, and long-term technical improvement.

items.title: Reduced Interface Complexity
items.description: Thermal, vacuum, instrumentation, and control subsystems are designed as one functional environment to reduce coordination effort, integration risk, and technical friction.

team.title: Engineering-Led from Day One
team.description: Deepvac is led by a founding team with complementary expertise in electrical engineering, mechatronics, refrigeration systems, and chamber development. This combination supports the development of advanced thermal vacuum infrastructure with strong technical depth across system design and implementation.

members.name: John Robertus
members.description: Electrical engineer focused on intelligent system integration, control architecture, and data-driven automation for mechatronic systems.

members.name: Anton Opalikhin
members.description: Mechanical engineer focused on refrigeration systems, chamber development, and thermal vacuum infrastructure for demanding test applications.

leadCapture.title: Discuss Your Thermal Vacuum Requirements
leadCapture.description: Whether you need a modular chamber platform, a custom TVAC configuration, or support for modernization and subsystem integration, Deepvac can help define the right system architecture for your application.

contact.description: Tell us about your chamber, test, or integration requirements.
